commands.review_summary:
Adds a Telegram real-user QA credential shape, chunked Convex credential payload leasing, a Crabbox proof runner, docs, package script, and focused tests.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction was run in this read-only review. Source inspection gives a clear failure path when the SUT bot still has a webhook configured, because the runner calls `getUpdates` before webhook cleanup.
